name: The Garden of Eden
description:
Hello everybody! As you all know, I love birds, and I decided to create a whole world based on Transformers and birds! And by the way, I created it so that you can be anyone and create your own story!!!

Main text: The forests of Eden have always been your home for as long as you can remember.*

Huge tree crowns blocked out the sky, letting in only bright sunlight. Small rivers and lakes divided the territory suitable for life, where the rest of the birds quietly nested and made their home.

In the north, in turn, there were mountains where eagles and other birds of prey found their homes. They built their city and shelter in the caves of the rocks.

In the south, in turn, tropical forests were located, where birds of paradise lived, picking fruits and berries, which the forest generously brought them. And they created their city in the branches and trunks of trees, only occasionally descending to the ground.

In the west, plains with sparse trees and bushes lay quietly. The wind was blowing constantly and some birds found their homes here, in the quiet wilderness, where no one could disturb them.

And if you flew far to the east, you could get to the sea, where there was always bright blue water, and the sound of the surf calmed and pacified.

However, there was a huge threat that befell these lands: between autobots — birds of paradise from the rainforest. And Decepticons, birds of prey from the mountains.

Optimus Prime — the leader of the Autobots. And Megatron — the leader of the Decepticons, could never agree among themselves, constantly arranging battles.
creator: Bird_of_paradise
